nodes.name: Gerygone
nodes.summary: Gerygone（Gerygone）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联19种鸟类，如Yellow-bellied gerygone、Brown gerygone、Green-backed gerygone等19种鸟类。

nodes.name: Golden-bellied gerygone
nodes.summary: The golden-bellied gerygone (Gerygone sulphurea) is a species of bird in the family Acanthizidae. It is found in Brunei, Indonesia, Malaysia, the Philippines, Singapore, Cambodia, Vietnam and Thailand. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical mangrove forest. Taxonomy Gerygone sulphurea includes the following subspecies: G. s. sulphurea - Wallace, 1864 G. s. muscicapa - Oberholser, 1912 G. s. simplex - Cabanis, 1872 G. s. rhizophorae - Mearns, 1905 G. s. flaveola - Cabanis, 1873 References
